dashboard.label: Endpoint Process Activity
dashboard.description: Monitor suspicious process execution, LOLBin usage, encoded commands, and LSASS access across endpoints. | ATT&CK: T1059, T1218, T1003, T1543

search.query: index=sysmon EventCode=1 earliest=-24h | stats count by Computer | sort - count

index=sysmon EventCode=1 Computer=$host_filter$ | eval process_name=lower(mvindex(split(Image, "\\"), -1)) | where process_name IN ( "certutil.exe", "mshta.exe", "regsvr32.exe", "rundll32.exe", "wscript.exe", "cscript.exe", "msbuild.exe", "installutil.exe", "regasm.exe", "regsvcs.exe", "cmstp.exe", "bitsadmin.exe", "esentutl.exe", "expand.exe", "extrac32.exe", "findstr.exe", "forfiles.exe", "hh.exe", "ieexec.exe", "infdefaultinstall.exe", "makecab.exe", "mavinject.exe", "microsoft.workflow.compiler.exe", "mmc.exe", "msconfig.exe", "msdt.exe", "msiexec.exe", "odbcconf.exe", "pcalua.exe", "pcwrun.exe", "presentationhost.exe", "replace.exe", "rpcping.exe", "schtasks.exe", "scriptrunner.exe", "syncappvpublishingserver.exe", "verclsid.exe", "wmic.exe", "xwizard.exe", "cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe" ) | eval creation_time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval parent_name=mvindex(split(ParentImage, "\\"), -1) | eval cmd_snippet=substr(CommandLine, 1, 200) | table creation_time, Computer, User, parent_name, process_name, cmd_snippet, IntegrityLevel | rename creation_time as "Time", Computer as "Host", User as "User", parent_name as "Parent Process", process_name as "Process", cmd_snippet as "Command Line (truncated)", IntegrityLevel as "Integrity" | sort - Time | head 100

index=sysmon EventCode=1 Computer=$host_filter$ (Image="*\\powershell.exe" OR Image="*\\pwsh.exe") (CommandLine="*-enc*" OR CommandLine="*-EncodedCommand*" OR CommandLine="*-e *" OR CommandLine="*[Convert]::FromBase64*" OR CommandLine="*bypass*" OR CommandLine="*-nop*" OR CommandLine="*hidden*" OR CommandLine="*downloadstring*" OR CommandLine="*iex*" OR CommandLine="*invoke-expression*" OR CommandLine="*downloadfile*" OR CommandLine="*webclient*" OR CommandLine="*bitstransfer*" OR CommandLine="*Net.Sockets*") | eval detection_time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval parent_name=mvindex(split(ParentImage, "\\"), -1) | eval flags=mvappend( if(match(CommandLine, "(?i)-enc"), "ENCODED", null()), if(match(CommandLine, "(?i)(downloadstring|downloadfile|webclient|bitstransfer)"), "DOWNLOAD", null()), if(match(CommandLine, "(?i)(iex|invoke-expression)"), "EXEC", null()), if(match(CommandLine, "(?i)bypass"), "BYPASS", null()), if(match(CommandLine, "(?i)hidden"), "HIDDEN", null()) ) | eval flags=mvjoin(flags, ", ") | eval cmd_preview=substr(CommandLine, 1, 300) | table detection_time, Computer, User, parent_name, flags, cmd_preview, ProcessId | rename detection_time as "Time", Computer as "Host", User as "User", parent_name as "Parent", flags as "Suspicious Flags", cmd_preview as "Command Line", ProcessId as "PID" | sort - Time

index=sysmon EventCode=10 TargetImage="*\\lsass.exe" Computer=$host_filter$ | eval granted_hex=lower(GrantedAccess) | where granted_hex IN ("0x1010", "0x1038", "0x1fffff", "0x1f0fff", "0x1f1fff", "0x143a", "0x1410", "0x40") | where NOT match(SourceImage, "(?i)(csrss\.exe|wininit\.exe|wmiprvse\.exe|svchost\.exe|MsMpEng\.exe|SecurityHealthService\.exe|WerFault\.exe)") | eval access_time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval source_proc=mvindex(split(SourceImage, "\\"), -1) | eval risk=case( match(SourceImage, "(?i)(temp|appdata|public|downloads)"), "CRITICAL", granted_hex IN ("0x1fffff", "0x1f0fff"), "CRITICAL", granted_hex IN ("0x1010", "0x1038"), "HIGH", 1=1, "MEDIUM" ) | table access_time, Computer, source_proc, SourceImage, GrantedAccess, SourceProcessId, risk | rename access_time as "Time", Computer as "Host", source_proc as "Source Process", SourceImage as "Full Path", GrantedAccess as "Access Rights", SourceProcessId as "Source PID", risk as "Risk" | sort - Time

panel.title: New Services Installed - Timeline (Sysmon Event 1 + WinEventLog 7045)

search.query: (index=wineventlog EventCode=7045) OR (index=sysmon EventCode=1 Image="*\\sc.exe" CommandLine="*create*") | eval service_detail=coalesce(ServiceName, CommandLine) | eval source=case( EventCode=7045, "System Event 7045", EventCode=1, "Sysmon Process Create" ) | timechart span=1h count by source

panel.title: Process Creation by Unusual Parent Processes (Sysmon Event 1)

search.query: index=sysmon EventCode=1 Computer=$host_filter$ | eval parent_name=lower(mvindex(split(ParentImage, "\\"), -1)) | eval child_name=lower(mvindex(split(Image, "\\"), -1)) | eval suspicious_combo=case( parent_name="winword.exe" AND child_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe"), "Office spawning shell", parent_name="excel.exe" AND child_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe"), "Office spawning shell", parent_name="outlook.exe" AND child_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe"), "Outlook spawning shell", parent_name="wmiprvse.exe" AND child_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe"), "WMI lateral movement", parent_name="services.exe" AND NOT match(Image, "(?i)\\\\(svchost|lsass|wininit|taskhost)\.exe$"), "Unusual service child", parent_name="svchost.exe" AND child_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","whoami.exe","net.exe","net1.exe"), "Svchost spawning recon", parent_name="w3wp.exe" AND child_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe"), "IIS web shell", parent_name="sqlservr.exe" AND child_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe"), "SQL Server shell", parent_name="explorer.exe" AND child_name IN ("mshta.exe","regsvr32.exe","rundll32.exe") AND match(CommandLine, "(?i)(http|\\\\\\\\|javascript)"), "Explorer suspicious child", 1=1, null() ) | where isnotnull(suspicious_combo) | eval creation_time=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval cmd_snippet=substr(CommandLine, 1, 250) | table creation_time, Computer, User, parent_name, child_name, suspicious_combo, cmd_snippet | rename creation_time as "Time", Computer as "Host", User as "User", parent_name as "Parent", child_name as "Child", suspicious_combo as "Detection Reason", cmd_snippet as "Command Line" | sort - Time | head 50

format.colorPalette: {"Office spawning shell":#DC4E41,"WMI lateral movement":#DC4E41,"IIS web shell":#DC4E41,"SQL Server shell":#DC4E41,"Outlook spawning shell":#F1813F,"Unusual service child":#F1813F,"Svchost spawning recon":#F8BE34,"Explorer suspicious child":#F8BE34}
